creator: mailinglist@diamondbox.dk
text:
After opening a few Gnome applications while running the Opera browser, all the sudden no Gnome applications are able to create their windows. After closing Opera, all pending applications continue and pop up their windows. I seem to remember this issue appearing around the move to the new Xorg.

Fix: 

Close and reopen Opera.
How-To-Repeat: Run Opera and open various Gnome applications until none of them open windows.
